title: solenostemon latifolius
intro: Solenostemon latifolius, also known as Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly used as an ornamental plant in tropical and subtropical regions. The leaves of Solenostemon latifolius have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Solenostemon latifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to make ointments and salves for topical application.
